tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project - Property Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: ACQUISITION OF PROPERTY INTERESTS FOR PENN STATION ACCESS PROJECT

payload.description: Provide direct rail access to Penn Station-New York and Manhattan's west side from southern Connecticut, Westchester County, and the east Bronx. Infrastructure improvements to Amtrak's Hell Gate Line and construction of four new Metro-North stations at Hunts Point, Parkchester-Van Nest, Morris Park, and Co-op City.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ACQUISITION OF PROPERTY INTERESTS FOR PENN STATION ACCESS PROJECT

tool_args.label: Metro-North Upgrade Automotive Fuel System Project
tool_args.raw_text: ACQUISITION OF PROPERTY INTERESTS FOR THE METRO-NORTH UPGRADE AUTOMOTIVE FUEL SYSTEM PROJECT

payload.project_name: Metro-North Upgrade Automotive Fuel System Project
payload.description: Design and construction of automotive fueling stations with above ground fueling systems to replace existing facilities at Harmon Yard, Brewster North Yard and North White Plains Yard. Requires acquisition of property at 4 Fisher Lane, White Plains, NY.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ACQUISITION OF PROPERTY INTERESTS FOR THE METRO-NORTH UPGRADE AUTOMOTIVE FUEL SYSTEM PROJECT

tool_args.label: PSA Equity and Access Benefits
tool_args.raw_text: The Project will greatly improve transit access for communities in the East Bronx, including low-income and minority communities

payload.claim_text: The Project will greatly improve transit access for communities in the East Bronx, including low-income and minority communities, saving riders traveling to Penn Station New York approximately 50 minutes. East Bronx passengers traveling to Connecticut could save up to approximately 75 minutes. Additionally, the new Metro-North stations will provide better access to employment opportunities, shopping and entertainment, the enhancement of transportation options for residents, workers and visitors as well as create a more attractive environment for residential and commercial development.
payload.subject: Penn Station Access Project
